notes:
Unlike Fruit or Labyrinth, which will play videos fine with LAVFilters (dl .exe and run in wine prefix), and quartz.dll from winetricks, Videos in Eden do not work AFAIK :/ 

When Videos start playing, the window is black and starts behaving weirdly. I was tempted to force quit the program since i had thought it was just broken.

Luckily if you just wait for the video to finish (you can hear the  audio from whatever video is playing fine) , the game will work again and play like Fruit or Labyrinth do.
title: The Eden of Grisaia
